hero.tagline: Multi-channel booking bot for beauty salons
hero.title: Bookings in Telegram without endless back-and-forth
hero.subtitle: ManicBot helps clients choose a service, find a suitable time, and confirm their appointment — via Telegram, Instagram, or WhatsApp.

about.title: What ManicBot does
about.p1: 💬 The bot handles common booking questions and helps clients move faster from first message to confirmed appointment.
about.p2: ⏱️ It reduces repetitive chat work, so the master or admin spends less time answering the same things over and over.
about.p3: 🏪 It works both for solo nail artists and for small salons that want a cleaner booking flow inside Telegram.

booking.title: Fewer repetitive messages
booking.description: Clients can choose a service and a suitable time right inside the chat.

reminders.title: Appointment reminders
reminders.description: Helpful reminders make it easier for clients to remember their visit.

answers.title: Help with common questions
answers.description: ManicBot can support routine booking questions and save time in daily communication.

flexible.title: For solo masters and salons
flexible.description: A flexible format for private specialists and small beauty teams.

multilang.title: 4 interface languages
multilang.description: Russian, Ukrainian, English and Polish — the bot speaks the client's language.

team.title: Team of masters
team.description: Multiple masters, schedules and roles — for a salon or studio.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: Three simple steps from first message to confirmed appointment

s1.title: Client messages the bot
s1.desc: Opens ManicBot in Telegram, taps Start, and picks a service from the list.

s2.title: Picks a time slot
s2.desc: The bot shows available slots — the client picks one with a tap, no back-and-forth needed.

s3.title: Booking confirmed
s3.desc: Client gets a confirmation, master gets a notification. Can be added to calendar.

ai.title: AI that supports the conversation
ai.subtitle: ManicBot is not just a set of buttons. It helps the dialogue feel smoother and more natural.

points.understands: 🧠 It can understand natural client messages and guide them toward a booking.
points.guides: 🗺️ It helps clients choose a suitable time without turning the chat into a mess.
points.savesTime: ⚡ It saves time for the master and makes everyday communication easier.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Simple and transparent plans for any scale

pro.name: Pro
pro.desc: For a salon with a team

contacts.title: Get in touch
contacts.subtitle: Open the bot in Telegram or send us an email.

cta.title: See how booking can work in Telegram
cta.subtitle: Open ManicBot and try the flow for yourself.

chat.ariaLabel: Example of a booking conversation with the bot
chat.hello: Hi! I can book you for a manicure. What service would you like?
chat.botDay: Sure, classic manicure. What day works for you?
chat.slots: Tomorrow I have 12:00, 14:30 and 16:00. What time suits you?
chat.success: Done! You're booked for tomorrow at 14:30. If anything changes, just write here.

channels.title: One platform, all channels
channels.subtitle: Your clients are on different platforms. ManicBot meets them where they are.

telegram.desc: Native bot experience with inline buttons, quick replies, and Google Calendar sync.

instagram.desc: Respond directly from Instagram DMs. Quick replies auto-adapt to Instagram's 13-button limit.

whatsapp.desc: Full booking flow in the most popular messenger worldwide.

compare.title: Why ManicBot
compare.subtitle: Not all booking tools are built the same way.

footer.tagline: Multi-channel booking bot for beauty professionals
